# Baidoa Aquifer

**Summary**: A major productive aquifer in the southern part of Somalia.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1993-moallim|Moallim, 1993]] evaluated the Baidoa aquifer's potential and productivity.

## Depositional Environment



## Reservoir Properties

- [[1993-moallim|Moallim, 1993]] Transmissivity up to 2.52 x 10^3 m^2/sec

## Diagenetic History



## Key Findings Across Sources

- The Baidoa aquifer has a high potential and can sustain long-term withdrawals. ([[1993-moallim|Moallim, 1993, p. 193]])
